title: 日本ダービーの後に・2つ目の冠

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon lives up to her fans'
expectations and takes the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower approaches us unsteadily, muttering
in despair that she wasn't able to catch up with
Mihono Bourbon, and falls unconscious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are only two outcomes to a race—victory or
defeat. Despite this, Rice Shower is focused on
catching up, which confuses Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I reassure her that she'll understand someday. In
the meantime, we establish the final Classic Triple
Crown race, the Kikuka Sho, as our next goal.
